name: HRG_GOAL_PLAN_SETS_VL
query: SELECT GPSB.GOAL_PLAN_SET_ID, GPSB.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, GPSB.GOAL_PLAN_SET_EXT_ID, GPSTL.GOAL_PLAN_SET_NAME, GPSTL.DESCRIPTION, GPSB.START_DATE, GPSB.END_DATE, GPSB.MASS_REQUEST_ID, GPSB.GOAL_PLAN_SET_ACTIVE_FLAG, GPSB.REQUEST_UI_CONTEXT_CODE, GPSB.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, GPSB.CREATED_BY, GPSB.CREATION_DATE, GPSB.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, GPSB.LAST_UPDATED_BY, GPSB.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, GPSB.REVIEW_PERIOD_ID, GPSB.REQUEST_ID, GPSB.REQUEST_STATUS FROM HRG_GOAL_PLAN_SETS_B GPSB, HRG_GOAL_PLAN_SETS_TL GPSTL WHERE GPSB.GOAL_PLAN_SET_ID = GPSTL.GOAL_PLAN_SET_ID AND GPSTL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
